name: Basil Bean Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beans according to directions, cooking until just tender-crisp.
2. Drain the beans.
3. Combine beans and onions in a large bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together remaining ingredients.
5. Pour the dressing over the beans and onions, tossing until well blended.
6. Chill several hours or overnight, stirring occasionally.
More Lean and Luscious Info per serving: 78 calories, 2g protein, 5g fat, 1mg cholesterol
